# Medici Social
> Elite Short-Form Content Agency

## About Us
Medici Social is a data-driven social media marketing agency specializing in short-form content. We are a collective of strategists, editors, and creators obsessed with turning attention into measurable growth for modern brands.

## Location
Houston, Texas, United States
(We serve clients globally)

## Core Services
1. Strategy: Deep-dive research into audiences, competitors, and platform trends to build a data-backed content roadmap.
2. Production: In-house editors and motion designers who turn raw footage into scroll-stopping short-form content at speed.
3. Growth: Dedicated analysts who optimize posting cadence, ad spend, and content formats to maximize ROI week over week.

## Philosophy
Social media isn't a megaphone. It's a conversation. We build brands that people actually want to listen to through platform-native, data-driven creativity and relentless iteration.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://www.medicisocial.com
- Email: info@medicisocial.com
